modules.title: AI Product Photography
modules.desc: Master AI tools to create stunning, studio-quality product images for ecom listings, ads, and brand catalogues — without a single physical shoot.
outcomes: Create professional product shots in any setting
Produce catalogue-ready images without a studio

modules.title: AI Brand Videos
modules.desc: Create professional video ads, product demos, and brand content using AI — ready for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube, and paid ads.
outcomes: Produce scroll-stopping video ads from scratch
Create brand reels for TikTok, Instagram & YouTube
No camera, crew, or editing experience needed

modules.title: AI Influencers
modules.desc: Build a custom AI influencer for your brand — a realistic, always-available spokesperson who promotes your products without contracts or per-post fees.
outcomes: Build your own branded AI influencer/spokesperson
Create realistic UGC and review-style videos
No models, no negotiations, no per-post fees

modules.title: AI Voice Cloning
modules.desc: Clone professional voices and generate studio-quality voiceovers for ads, product demos, and brand content in any language — instantly.
outcomes: Clone voices for professional voiceovers instantly
Generate multilingual audio for ads & demos
Complete your full AI content audio toolkit

modules.title: AI Avatars
modules.desc: Create hyper-realistic AI avatars to serve as your brand's face in videos — talking-head content, explainers, and ads without hiring a model.
outcomes: Create unlimited avatar-based content for your brand
Offer AI content as a high-value service to clients
Scale without ever booking another shoot again
